subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #043 The Two Kinds of Prophets
subcodes.first_line: Prophets are in general of two kinds. Some are independent Prophets Who are followed, while others are not independent and are themselves followers.
subcodes.first_line_orig: کلیهء انبیا بر دو قسمند قسمی نبی بالاستقلالند و متبوع و قسمی دیگر غیر مستقل و تابع
subcodes.subjects: @categories of Prophets (major; minor; village), @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @Buddhism and Hinduism; religions of the East
